ModMetaData.name: The Gods Are Real [ALPHA]
ModMetaData.author: Kyle Givler
ModMetaData.description:
The Gods Are Real introduces a dynamic, per-pawn Favor system that brings your Ideology's deities to life. Devotion is no longer a static choice—it is a measurable, shifting resource that determines your pawn's standing with the divine.
Please note this mod is in ACTIVE ALPHA DEVELOPMENT.
Key Mechanics: - Favor System: Pawns are tracked from "Divine Wrath" (-100) to "Divine Grace" (+100). - Passive Decay: Favor is a fleeting resource; without active worship, it will naturally drift toward zero. - Divine Touch: A dynamic Hediff that reflects a pawn's standing, providing gameplay-impacting consequences based on their devotion. - Active Worship: Gain favor through scheduled Rituals, daily Ideology-based thoughts, and active Prayer at your Altars.
Technical Focus: - High-Performance: Built with efficiency in mind, using optimized dictionary lookups and avoiding heavy overhead in hot code paths. - Seamless Integration: Deep hooks into core RimWorld systems for a natural, bug-resistant experience. - Self-Cleaning: Includes automated data sanitization to prevent save-file bloat.
Plans: - More divine boons and event-based consequences for extreme favor levels. - Expanded mod settings to allow players to balance decay and gain rates to their preference. - Continued development based on community feedback.
Source Code: Looking for contributors! https://github.com/JoyfulReaper/TheGodsAreReal
